arts.ttl: Napoli Hopes of Signing Prodigious Winger Suffer Hammer Blow
arts.sum: Karim Adeyemi rejected Napoli in the January transfer window, even though Borussia Dortmund were ready to sanction his departure. According to Sky Sport Germany, the young gun has changed his entourage to secure a long-term stay at Signal Iduna Park. The post Napoli Hopes of Signing Prodigious Winger Suffer Hammer Blow appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
